name: Weary Traveler
ailment_narrative: I haven't slept in three nights. The road won't quiet in my head.

name: Tired Apprentice
ailment_narrative: My master expects ten potions by dusk and my arms feel made of stone.

name: Fretful Merchant
ailment_narrative: Every shadow looks like a thief tonight. I cannot still my hands.

name: Scratched Woodsman
ailment_narrative: A boar took a strip off my arm. The bandage isn't holding.

name: Restless Widow
ailment_narrative: Since my husband passed, sleep visits like a stranger — briefly.

name: Muddled Scholar
ailment_narrative: My thoughts scatter like starlings. I've lost the thread of the whole chapter.
